localizations.title: A Noside Story
localizations.hiddenObject_3: The smoke in the fireplace hides a strange device.
localizations.hiddenObject_2: There is a needle in the haystack.
localizations.hiddenObject_4: Did you look into the bathtub?
localizations.code_4444: The cage door opens right when Noside leaves the room. You are free! Take back the cards put aside.
localizations.code_2546: The cage door opens right when Noside leaves the room. You are free! Take back the cards put aside.
localizations.code_8471: The fax switches on. You manage to write a SOS on a piece of paper and send it to the police. Noside is locked up, the county will finally be able to take a deep breath.
localizations.code_5287: It would be too easy, don't you think so? You must use 5287 but you forget 1 = ---, 2 = ---
localizations.code_7825: It would be too easy, don't you think so? You must use 7825 but you forget 1 = ---, 2 = ---
localizations.code_5049: It would be too easy, don't you think so? You must use 5049 but you forget 1 = ---, 2 = ---
localizations.code_9405: It would be too easy, don't you think so? You must use 9405 but you forget 1 = ---, 2 = ---
localizations.code_8909: It would be too easy, don't you think so? You must use 8909 but you forget 1 = ---, 2 = ---
localizations.code_9098: It would be too easy, don't you think so? You must use 9098 but you forget 1 = ---, 2 = ---
localizations.code_5575: The cage door opens right when Noside leaves the room. You are free! Take back the cards put aside.
localizations.code_4345: The cage door opens right when Noside leaves the room. You are free! Take back the cards put aside.
localizations.code_8063: It would be too easy, don't you think so? You must use 8063 but you forget 1 = ---, 2 = ---
localizations.code_50491: The cage door opens right when Noside leaves the room. You are free! Take back the cards put aside.
localizations.code_5653: La porte de la cage s'ouvre juste au moment où Noside quitte la pièce. Vous êtes libres ! Reprenez les cartes mises de côté.
localizations.code_5792: It would be too easy, don't you think so? You must use 5792 but you forget 1 = ---, 2 = ---
localizations.hint_222_first: The clothes are sized differently. Does it ring a bell?
localizations.hint_222: Use the child's drawing to combine clothes in the proper order.
localizations.hint_333: Divide the robot's head in two. Now, what number do you see?
localizations.hint_444: Get the right ingredients and follow the recipe step by step. You will most definitely obtain a good cake.
localizations.hint_30: What could you bathe him in?
localizations.hint_10: This will help you face Noside in due time.
localizations.hint_1: You could turn this wheat into flour provided that you have what it takes to grind it.
localizations.hint_2: The honey is too sticky to be thrown by hand. A device to propel it should do the trick.
localizations.hint_3: This animal seems to the only one who can wear a snorkeling gear so small.
localizations.hint_5: Essential clue: the fire will die down if you pour water on it. Sorry to spoil the surprise!
localizations.hint_78: Better to let it cool down.
localizations.hint_4: The dentures bear a notch. Probably for a winding key.
localizations.hint_8: This branch is only useful for throwing. But at whom?
localizations.hint_9: Find a crank handle to pull this rope up.
localizations.hint_11_first: It blows a gentle and steady heat.
localizations.hint_11: This heat is perfect to have an egg hatch.
localizations.hint_12: Aim at your enemy with the honey.
localizations.hint_18: This device should get… er… er… er… plugged, for example.
localizations.hint_95: The entire house power is dedicated to Noside's weapon. Defeat him to restore power.
localizations.hint_16: You can cool something by putting it on the edge of this window.
localizations.hint_21: This bucket can contain a whole bunch of things… even if it seems very suitable for liquids.
localizations.hint_23_first: If the sign is to be trusted, you need to take off your clothes before going in. Maybe the outfits in the room will be of help?
localizations.hint_23: Use the child's drawing to combine clothes in the proper order. It will give you the code.
localizations.hint_24: Get the right ingredients and follow the recipe step by step. You will most definitely obtain a good cake.
localizations.hint_94: Turn menace into strength! The extraordinary power of this bear could be a good ally to defeat Noside. But still to do so, you will need to lure it to him.
localizations.hint_27: Given the size of the snorkeling gear, there are not many creatures that could wear it.
localizations.hint_97_first: Beside time, what else could you adjust on such a device?
localizations.hint_29: What could this dog bring you?
localizations.hint_55: Churn the milk until it becomes butter.
localizations.hint_72: You are not strong enough to defeat Noside by yourselves. You should find an ally and lure it to the infamous professor.
localizations.hint_34: You need a container to collect the cow's milk.
localizations.hint_36: Some heat should stimulate the hatching.
localizations.hint_37: This item may probably be used to pull something up. A rope, for example.
localizations.hint_84: You are not strong enough to defeat Noside by yourselves, even if he's covered in honey. You should find an ally.
localizations.hint_46: Essential clue: the fire will die down if you pour water on it. Sorry to spoil the surprise!
localizations.hint_47: Despite his young age, Michael knows how to fly. He could bring you back shiny objects.
localizations.hint_49: This stopper will come in handy.
localizations.hint_193: Once you know what time it is, put the hands back where they belong. What do they form now?
localizations.hint_51: Look closely at the inscription in the fireplace.
localizations.hint_52: What are these balloons hiding? It would be best to find a way to pop them. A needle, maybe?
localizations.hint_7: One has to be small and capable of flying to go fetch the shiny object that is stuck.
localizations.hint_61: This winding key should easily fit in the notch of an object requiring a winder.
localizations.hint_65: These clacking spring-powered dentures would make an excellent grinder. Still, something to be ground must be found.
localizations.hint_99: Apply the modifier on a device requiring power.
localizations.hint_100_first: It's impossible to go inside without a key.
localizations.hint_100: Look carefully at the message as it gives you the code.
localizations.hint_111_first: Noside wrote a MEMO on a piece of paper. It reflects in a pan. But this reminder is coded. The dashes after ONE: --- / TWO: --- / etc. are the key.
localizations.hint_111: The numbers themselves are not what matters, but their number of letters do.
localizations.hint_123_first: Only clothes and their order are important in this drawing.
localizations.hint_123: To enter the bathroom you must match the clothes following the order displayed on the drawing.
localizations.hint_200: Look carefully at the message as it gives you the code.
